title: ANC - 5.-ANC is ON and User changes its value from Adaptive to Standard or vice versa during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: Verify that during an active call, the user can switch ANC between Adaptive and Standard modes while Transparency Mode remains disabled, and the settings persist after the call ends.
steps: 1. Ensure ANC is ON and set to either Adaptive or Standard mode.
2. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
3. Start or join an active call.
4. During the active call, change the ANC value from Adaptive to Standard (or vice versa).
5. Verify that the user can successfully switch between Adaptive and Standard modes while on the call.
6. Confirm that ANC remains ON throughout the call.
7. Confirm that Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible during the call.
9. After the call ends, verify that the ANC and Transparency Mode settings persist correctly (i.e., ANC remains in the last selected mode and Transparency Mode remains OFF/greyed out).
expected: The user can switch between Adaptive and Standard ANC modes during an active call. ANC remains ON, Transparency Mode stays greyed out/inaccessible during the call, and after the call ends the settings persist correctly.
